title: Homepage renders featured products grid and carousel content
description: Verifies the home page loads and shows the featured products grid and product carousel content to a guest visitor.

steps.description: Verify element "Featured products grid" is visible

title: Scroll through featured products grid without losing content
description: Verifies a visitor can scroll through the featured products grid area and still see product tiles rendered.

steps.description: Verify element "Featured products grid" is visible

title: Scroll the product carousel to reveal additional items
description: Verifies the product carousel can be advanced and still shows product items after scrolling.

title: Open a product detail page from a featured grid tile
description: Verifies clicking a featured product tile navigates to a product detail page that shows title and price.

steps.description: Verify element "Featured products grid" is visible
Click a "Product tile" in the featured products grid

title: Homepage shows loading placeholders before featured content appears
description: Verifies the home page initially shows loading placeholders for featured products and then shows product tiles.

steps.description: Verify element "Featured products loading placeholders" is visible
Wait for element "Product tile" to appear

title: Navigate to Search from header navigation on the homepage
description: Verifies a visitor can use the header navigation to reach the search page from the home page.

title: Empty featured section shows an empty or generic error message and user can still go to Search
description: Verifies that if featured products fail to render, an empty state or generic error is shown and navigation to Search still works.

steps.description: Wait for element "Featured products section" to appear
Verify element "Featured products empty state" is visible

title: Open a product detail page from Home and verify key PDP content renders
description: Verifies a shopper can navigate from the home page to a product detail page and see the main image, title, and price.

steps.description: Click on the first product tile in the featured products section
Verify element "Main product image" is visible

title: Change gallery thumbnail and verify main product image updates
description: Verifies clicking a gallery thumbnail updates the main product image on the PDP.

steps.description: Click on the first product tile in the featured products section
Verify element "Main product image" is visible
Click on the second gallery thumbnail
Verify element "Main product image" is visible

title: Read HTML-rendered product description on PDP
description: Verifies the product description section renders visible content (HTML-rendered) on the PDP.

steps.description: Click on the first product tile in the featured products section
Scroll to the product description section

title: Verify related products section is visible and opens another PDP
description: Verifies related products render on the PDP and a related item navigates to a different product page.

steps.description: Click on the first product tile in the featured products section
Scroll down to the related products section
Click on the first product tile in the related products section

title: PDP initial loading placeholders appear before product content
description: Verifies the product page shows loading placeholders/skeletons before full product content is displayed.

steps.description: Click on the first product tile in the featured products section
Verify element "Product loading placeholders" is visible
Wait for element "Product title" to appear
Verify element "Main product image" is visible

title: Recover from empty/error PDP state by returning to Home via navbar logo
description: Verifies that if the PDP shows a generic empty/error state, the shopper can navigate back to the home page using the navbar logo.

steps.description: Click on the first product tile in the featured products section
Verify element "Generic error or empty product state" is visible
Click on the site logo in the navbar

title: Search returns results and opens a product detail page
description: Verifies a shopper can search from /search, see results count and query text, and open a product from the results grid.

steps.description: Click the search input in the navbar
Click on the first product in the results grid

title: Search shows total results count for a common query
description: Verifies that after submitting a search, the UI displays a visible total results count along with the query text.

steps.description: Click the search input in the navbar

title: Zero-results search shows empty state and allows continue shopping
description: Verifies a search with no matches shows a no-results empty state and the Continue Shopping action is available.

steps.description: Click the search input in the navbar

title: Zero-results search can be recovered by modifying the query to get results
description: Verifies that a shopper can change a no-results query to a common query and see the results grid appear.

steps.description: Click the search input in the navbar
Click the search input in the navbar

title: Search handles whitespace-only input without crashing
description: Verifies submitting a whitespace-only query does not break the page and shows a stable visible state (results or empty state).

steps.description: Click the search input in the navbar
Verify element "search results section" is visible

title: Search supports special characters in query and remains functional
description: Verifies that a query containing special characters is accepted and the page remains usable with a visible result or empty state.

steps.description: Click the search input in the navbar
Verify element "search results section" is visible

title: Search results grid is scrollable and remains populated while browsing
description: Verifies the shopper can scroll through results and the grid stays visible without losing the query context.

steps.description: Click the search input in the navbar
Scroll to the bottom of the results grid

title: Switch collections from left sidebar updates the collection results grid
description: Verifies that selecting a different collection from the left sidebar updates the visible product grid accordingly.
category: Filter and Sort Products by Collection

steps.description: Click on the first visible collection link in the left sidebar.
Verify element "Product results grid" is visible.
Click on a different visible collection link in the left sidebar.
Verify element "Product results grid" is visible.

title: Change sort order updates the product grid for the current collection
description: Verifies that changing the sort option in the right sidebar causes the product grid to refresh for the same collection.
category: Filter and Sort Products by Collection

steps.description: Click on any visible collection link in the left sidebar.
Verify element "Product results grid" is visible.
Click on the sort dropdown in the right sidebar.
Select "Price: Low to High" from the sort dropdown.
Verify element "Product results grid" is visible.
Click on the sort dropdown in the right sidebar.
Select "Price: High to Low" from the sort dropdown.

title: Sort selection persists while switching between collections during the session
description: Verifies that a chosen sort option remains selected when the user switches collections using the left sidebar.
category: Filter and Sort Products by Collection

steps.description: Click on any visible collection link in the left sidebar.
Click on the sort dropdown in the right sidebar.
Select "Price: Low to High" from the sort dropdown.
Verify text "Price: Low to High" is visible.
Click on a different visible collection link in the left sidebar.
Verify text "Price: Low to High" is visible.

title: Open a product from a collection results grid to reach the product detail page
description: Verifies that clicking a product card from a collection results grid navigates to a product detail page.
category: Filter and Sort Products by Collection

steps.description: Click on any visible collection link in the left sidebar.
Verify element "Product results grid" is visible.
Click on the first visible product card in the product results grid.
Verify element "Add to cart" is visible.

title: Loading placeholders appear before collection products render
description: Verifies that loading placeholders are shown while collection results are being fetched and then the grid appears.
category: Filter and Sort Products by Collection

steps.description: Click on any visible collection link in the left sidebar.
Verify element "Product results grid" is visible.

title: Empty collection state is shown when a collection has no products
description: Verifies that the UI shows an empty-state message when the selected collection returns no products.
category: Filter and Sort Products by Collection

steps.description: Click on any visible collection link in the left sidebar.
Verify element "Product results grid" is visible.
Click on a collection link that appears to be empty or returns no results (if present) in the left sidebar.
Verify element "Product results grid" is not visible.

title: Recover from an empty or error state by switching to another collection
description: Verifies that after seeing an empty/error state for one collection, selecting another collection updates the view to show products or a new empty state.
category: Filter and Sort Products by Collection

steps.description: Click on a collection link that appears to be empty or returns no results (if present) in the left sidebar.
Click on a different visible collection link in the left sidebar.
Verify element "Product results grid" is visible.

title: Sorting controls remain available even when no products are shown
description: Verifies the sort dropdown is still present and operable when the selected collection has no results.
category: Filter and Sort Products by Collection

steps.description: Click on a collection link that appears to be empty or returns no results (if present) in the left sidebar.
Click on the sort dropdown in the right sidebar.
Verify element "Sort options list" is visible.

title: Add item to cart from PDP, update quantity, and proceed to Shopify Checkout
description: Verifies a shopper can add a product to the cart, increase quantity in the cart drawer, see subtotal update, and proceed to Shopify Checkout.
category: Shopping Cart and Add to Cart

steps.description: Click on a featured product in the product grid to open its product detail page.
Select an available product variant option if variant selection is presented.
Click the Add to Cart button.
Click the cart icon/button in the site header to open the cart drawer.
Verify the added product line item is visible in the cart drawer with a quantity displayed.
Click the Plus (increase quantity) control for the line item.
Verify the subtotal amount shown in the cart drawer is visible and reflects the updated quantity.

title: Proceed to Checkout redirects to Shopify checkout domain
description: Verifies that clicking Proceed to Checkout from the cart drawer redirects the shopper to the Shopify checkout page.
category: Shopping Cart and Add to Cart

steps.description: Click on a featured product in the product grid to open its product detail page.
Select an available product variant option if variant selection is presented.
Click the Add to Cart button.
Click the cart icon/button in the site header to open the cart drawer.
Click the Proceed to Checkout button.

title: Variant required: Add to Cart is prevented when variant is not selected
description: Verifies that when a product requires a variant selection, Add to Cart is disabled or prevented until the shopper selects a variant.
category: Shopping Cart and Add to Cart

steps.description: Click on a featured product in the product grid to open its product detail page.
Verify an option to select a variant (such as size or color) is visible on the page.
Click the Add to Cart button without selecting any variant option.
Verify text indicating a selection is required (or an equivalent validation message) is visible, or the Add to Cart control appears disabled.
Click the cart icon/button in the site header to open the cart drawer.
Verify the cart drawer shows an empty state message or no line items are visible.

title: Cart drawer shows correct item details after adding (thumbnail and quantity)
description: Verifies the cart drawer presents the added product with a thumbnail/image and quantity information.
category: Shopping Cart and Add to Cart

steps.description: Click on a featured product in the product grid to open its product detail page.
Select an available product variant option if variant selection is presented.
Click the Add to Cart button.
Click the cart icon/button in the site header to open the cart drawer.
Verify a product thumbnail/image is visible for the cart line item.
Verify the cart line item quantity indicator is visible.

title: Decrease quantity in cart drawer and verify quantity updates
description: Verifies a shopper can decrease an item quantity using the cart drawer controls and the displayed quantity updates accordingly.
category: Shopping Cart and Add to Cart

steps.description: Click on a featured product in the product grid to open its product detail page.
Select an available product variant option if variant selection is presented.
Click the Add to Cart button.
Click the cart icon/button in the site header to open the cart drawer.
Click the Plus (increase quantity) control for the line item.
Click the Minus (decrease quantity) control for the line item.
Verify the line item quantity displayed is visible and reflects the decreased amount.

title: Remove item from cart drawer results in empty cart state
description: Verifies a shopper can remove an item from the cart and the cart drawer updates to show an empty state.
category: Shopping Cart and Add to Cart

steps.description: Click on a featured product in the product grid to open its product detail page.
Select an available product variant option if variant selection is presented.
Click the Add to Cart button.
Click the cart icon/button in the site header to open the cart drawer.
Click the Remove (delete) control for the line item.
Verify the cart drawer shows an empty state message or no line items are visible.
Verify the subtotal amount is not shown or is shown as zero.

title: Home page shows consistent global layout (navbar + footer)
description: Verifies the home page renders the global navbar elements and footer as part of the consistent layout.

steps.description: Verify element "navbar search input" is visible
Verify element "navbar cart icon" is visible
Verify element "navbar cart item counter" is visible

title: Navigate from Home to Search using navbar and keep header/footer consistent
description: Verifies navbar navigation to the Search page works and the global layout remains consistent after navigation.

steps.description: Verify element "navbar search input" is visible
Verify element "navbar cart icon" is visible

title: Search via navbar input routes to search results page
description: Verifies typing a query into the navbar search input and submitting takes the user to the Search page with results context.

title: Add to cart shows toast confirmation
description: Verifies that adding an item to the cart triggers a visible toast confirmation message.

steps.description: Click on a "featured product" from the home page
Verify element "Add to cart" is visible
Verify element "navbar cart item counter" is visible

title: Cart persists across navigation from product page to search page
description: Verifies cart state (cart counter) persists after adding an item and navigating to another page.

steps.description: Click on a "featured product" from the home page
Verify element "navbar cart item counter" is visible
Verify element "navbar cart item counter" is visible

title: Cart contents visible via cart icon after adding item
description: Verifies the cart slide-out (or cart panel) can be opened from the navbar and shows the added item.

steps.description: Click on a "featured product" from the home page
Verify element "cart line item" is visible

title: Navbar still usable when navigation menu links are missing/reduced
description: Verifies that even if the navbar shows reduced/placeholder navigation links, search and cart actions remain usable.

steps.description: Verify element "navbar search input" is visible
Verify element "navbar cart icon" is visible

title: Footer remains present after multiple navigations
description: Verifies the footer continues to render after navigating between pages, indicating consistent global layout.

title: Empty search input submission keeps page stable
description: Verifies submitting an empty search query in the navbar does not show an error and the page remains usable.

steps.description: Click the search input in the navbar
Ensure the search input is empty
Verify the search input is still visible
